rule.title: SonarQube MCP Server Configuration
Available MCP Tools
rule.description:
Use these SonarQube MCP tools for analysis:
1. list_projects - Lists all projects in SonarQube - No parameters required - Returns: project keys, names, and last analysis dates
2. get_project_metrics - Retrieves quality metrics for a specific project - Parameters: projectKey (required) - Returns: bugs, vulnerabilities, code_smells, coverage, duplications, etc.
3. get_issues - Fetches issues for a project - Parameters: projectKey (required), severities (optional), types (optional) - Returns: list of issues with details
4. get_quality_gate_status - Checks if project passes quality gate - Parameters: projectKey (required) - Returns: status (PASSED/FAILED), conditions
5. search_issues - Searches for specific issues across projects - Parameters: query filters - Returns: matching issues
Always use projectKey when available. For Java Maven projects, the projectKey is typically defined in pom.xml as: :

rule.title: Error Handling
rule.description:
Handle SonarQube MCP errors gracefully:
1. 403 Forbidden - Check authentication token - Verify project exists and user has access - Suggest manual verification via UI
2. 404 Not Found - Project may not exist in SonarQube - Verify project key is correct - Suggest running initial scan first
3. Connection Errors - Check MCP server URL - Verify network connectivity - Suggest alternative analysis methods (mvn sonar:sonar)
4. Timeout - Large projects may take time to analyze - Suggest checking SonarQube UI for progress - Retry after waiting
Always provide fallback options when MCP tools fail.

rule.title: Best Practices for MCP Usage
rule.description:
Follow these best practices:
1. Always list projects first to verify connectivity 2. Use specific project keys rather than searching 3. Filter issues by severity to focus on critical items 4. Retrieve metrics in batches for large projects 5. Cache results to avoid repeated API calls 6. Provide context when reporting errors 7. Include project key in all error messages 8. Suggest manual UI verification for complex issues
